allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/admin/roles -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer test" -d '{""name"":""TestRole123"",""description"":""A test role""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/admin/roles -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer test" -d '{""name"":""TestRole456"",""description"":""Another test role""}')
Bash(timeout 5 bash -c 'for i in {1..10}; do curl -s http://localhost:5000/health && break; sleep 1; done')
Bash(wmic process where name="node.exe" call terminate)
Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/admin/roles -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""name"":""CustomRole123"",""description"":""Test custom role""}')

Bash(sqlite3 backend/prisma/dev.db "SELECT r.id, r.name, p.name as permission FROM roles r LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.roleId LEFT JOIN permissions p ON rp.permissionId = p.id WHERE r.name = ''ADMIN'' ORDER BY p.name;")

Bash(psql -U postgres -h localhost -d planeandprop -c "SELECT r.id, r.name, STRING_AGG\(p.name, '', '' ORDER BY p.name\) as permissions FROM roles r LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.roleId LEFT JOIN permissions p ON rp.permissionId = p.id WHERE r.name = ''ADMIN'' GROUP BY r.id, r.name;")

Bash(npm run db:query "SELECT r.name as role, GROUP_CONCAT\(p.name, '', ''\) as permissions FROM roles r LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.roleId LEFT JOIN permissions p ON rp.permissionId = p.id WHERE r.name = ''ADMIN'' GROUP BY r.id, r.name;")
